context: You are at a language exchange meetup in Berlin and meet a German speaker named Lukas.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Hallo! Ich bin Lukas. Wie heißt du?
exchanges.translation: Hello! I am Lukas. What is your name?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Greet him and say your name (say 'Hello, I am...')

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Schön, dich kennenzulernen! Woher kommst du?
exchanges.translation: Nice to meet you! Where are you from?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say where you are from (say 'I am from...')

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Interessant! Und warum lernst du Deutsch?
exchanges.translation: Interesting! And why are you learning German?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say you are learning German because it is interesting

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Das stimmt! Lernst du schon lange Deutsch?
exchanges.translation: That is true! Have you been learning German for long?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say you have been learning German for three months
acceptedResponses: Ich lerne seit drei Monaten Deutsch
Ich lerne Deutsch seit drei Monaten
exchanges.hint: Ich lerne seit drei Monaten Deutsch.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Wow, dein Deutsch ist schon gut! Wo wohnst du in Berlin?
exchanges.translation: Wow, your German is already good! Where do you live in Berlin?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say you live in the city center (Mitte)

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Cool! Darf ich deine Nummer haben? Wir können zusammen üben.
exchanges.translation: Cool! May I have your number? We can practice together.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Super! Bis bald, schönen Abend noch!
exchanges.translation: Great! See you soon, have a nice evening!

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say goodbye and wish him a nice evening too
